title: Opticreate+
body:
⚙️ OptiCreate+ – The Ultimate Optimized Create Experience

Version: 1.21.1 (NeoForge)
Focus: Create Mod • Optimization • Performance • Smooth Automation

🌍 Overview

OptiCreate+ is a performance-optimized Create modpack built for NeoForge 1.21.1.
It focuses entirely on smooth gameplay, creative automation, and technical builds — all while staying lightweight and stable.

With powerful optimization mods and handpicked Create addons, OptiCreate+ delivers the best possible Create experience without FPS drops or unnecessary bloat.

Create mod:https://modrinth.com/mod/create
